name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter flavor Crisco and sugar in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
2. Combine flour with baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt. Blend into the creamed mixture. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Roll out dough on a floured surface to an 1/8 inch thickness. Cut into desired shapes with cookie cutters. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 6-7 minutes. Cool on baking sheets for about 1 minute before removing to cooling racks.
Makes 5 1/2 to 6 dozen cookies.
NOTE: For holidays, cut dough into desired holiday shapes. Sprinkle with colored sugar crystals before baking.
